landing.headline: Run your warehouse with less mess.
landing.subhead: Inbound & outbound tracking ready for many companies in one app.
landing.featureMultiTenantBody: Each company gets isolated data, its own document formats, and its own users.
landing.featureBarcodeBody: Capture transactions fast with a phone camera — no extra hardware required.
landing.featureReportsBody: Stock cards, movements, low-stock — export to Excel or PDF in one click.
